pageSubtitle: Display language, API keys, and integration access.
interfaceLanguageIntro: Your choice is saved to your account and applies when you sign in on any device.
interfaceLanguageSignInHint: Sign in to save your display language to your account.
apiKeysIntro: Create keys for assistants and scripts that call openKMS on your behalf.
keyCreatedHint: This value is shown only once. If you lose it, revoke the key and create a new one.
confirmRevoke: Revoke this key? Apps using it will stop working.
